zh: 製造孩子表達意見的機會、
en: Create chances for your child to express their opinions —

zh: 如談卡通影片的角色、情節、
en: like talking about cartoon characters and plots,
or including them in family discussions.

zh: 在可能的範圍內接受他的意見、
增加他對自己言論的信心、
en: building confidence in their own voice,
so they dare to express themselves,
and engage in real discussion with others.
